import React from 'react'; const s = { page: { minHeight: 'calc(100vh - 64px)', background: '#f3f4f6', padding: '40px 24px', }, container: { maxWidth: 1280, margin: '0 auto', }, title: { fontSize: 28, fontWeight: 700, color: '#111827', marginBottom: 24, }, section: { background: '#fff', border: '1px solid #e5e7eb', borderRadius: 10, padding: 32, marginBottom: 24, boxShadow: '0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.07)', }, sectionTitle: { fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 600, color: '#1f2937', marginBottom: 16, }, text: { fontSize: 14, color: '#4b5563', lineHeight: 1.8, marginBottom: 16, }, features: { display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr))', gap: 20, marginTop: 20, }, featureCard: { border: '1px solid #e5e7eb', borderRadius: 8, padding: 16, background: '#f9fafb', }, featureIcon: { fontSize: 32, marginBottom: 12, }, featureTitle: { fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 600, color: '#1f2937', marginBottom: 8, }, }; export default function About() { return (

ℹ️ About HireSense

🎯 Our Mission

HireSense is an intelligent resume screening platform that uses advanced NLP and machine learning to automatically parse resumes, extract skills, and rank candidates by job fit. We help recruiters make smarter hiring decisions faster.

✨ Key Features

📄
Smart Resume Parsing

Extract key information from PDF and DOCX files automatically using AI.

🎯
Skill Matching

Match candidate skills against job requirements with 100+ recognized technologies.

📊
AI Ranking

Intelligent ranking algorithm weighing skills, experience, and project involvement.

🔐
Privacy First

Candidates see scores and skills only, no personal contact information exposed.

🏢
Multi-Company

Support for multiple registered companies and recruiters on one platform.

⚙️
Custom Criteria

Set custom job requirements, skills, and experience thresholds for each role.

🧠 How It Works

1. Recruiter uploads resumes in PDF or DOCX format for a specific job opening.

2. AI processes the resumes extracting names, skills, education, and experience.

3. Intelligent ranking matches candidate skills to job requirements with weighted scoring:

  • 70% - Required skill match
  • 20% - Semantic relevance to job description
  • 10% - Project experience & background weighting

4. Results displayed with detailed scoring breakdown, matched/missing skills, and candidate profiles.

📋 Candidate Privacy

Candidates can view their own score and see rankings of other candidates along with matched skills. However, sensitive information like email, phone number, and personal details are kept private and only visible to the recruiter.

💼 For Recruiters

Sign up as a recruiter to access the full screening suite. Upload resumes, define job requirements, set required skills, and get AI-ranked results in seconds. Manage multiple job openings and candidates from one dashboard.

🚀 Getting Started

Recruiter Flow: Go to the "Recruiter" tab, upload resumes, set job requirements, and click Analyze.

Candidate Flow: Go to the "Candidate" tab to view your scoring and compare with other applicants (anonymously).

Companies: Manage company information, register new recruiting organizations, and assign recruiters.
